name: se7enxweb/sevenx_dse
description: sevenx_dse : 7x Database Source Editor — embeds AdminNeo as a direct database source editor inside the eZ Publish / Exponential Platform Legacy admin UI — providing raw SQL, table browsing, import/export, and multi-driver support (MySQL, SQLite) through a scoped, permission-gated interface.

suggest.ext-openssl: Allows secure encryption of login information
suggest.ext-zlib: Allows gzip compression of data export
suggest.ext-bz2: Allows bzip2 compression of data export
suggest.ext-zip: Allows ZIP compression of data export
suggest.ext-mysql: Allows access to MySQL database (old driver)
suggest.ext-sqlsrv: Allows access to MS SQ database
suggest.ext-libxml: Allows processing responses from SimpleDB database
suggest.ext-pdo_dblib: PDO driver for MS SQL database and Sybase
